text:
Dear haskell@,

> Synopsis: [MAINTAINER UPDATE]: print/hs-hscolour version 1.10.1

Please note that PR ports/128344 has been submitted.

It contains changes to lang/ghc and devel/hs-haddock-docs which you
maintain, please approve them.
